Closes #___

## Eagle Apps PR Self-Checklist

- [ ] I read the Figma spec and/or Loom videos before starting work
- [ ] I implemented every acceptance criterion listed in the GitHub Issue
- [ ] I verified my output matches the Figma design visually
- [ ] All in-scope items are included
- [ ] Nothing marked out of scope without prior written approval
- [ ] I tested the feature manually end-to-end
- [ ] No TODOs, placeholders, or commented-out code remain
- [ ] API documentation is in the requested format
- [ ] Commit messages are descriptive and reference the Issue number
- [ ] No AI-generated code was submitted without being read and understood line by line
- [ ] PR description includes `Closes #[issue number]`
